summary:
Fixed the N+1 problem.

What I did
1. Created DataLoader instances once per request (context.ts) and exposed them through ctx.loaders.
2. Re-implemented user and post resolvers to reuse those loaders instead of creating new ones every call.
3. Removed the old duplicate resolver code that was instantiating loaders on every resolver invocation.

Result
All functional tests still pass, and the performance test now shows only 2 DB queries instead of hundreds.  
Running ./test.sh prints PASS.
